searchDocs.title: HighFidelityBehavior‚Äã
searchDocs.content: </> type HighFidelityBehavior = { Default, Automatic, Always } How High-Fidelity the cast simulation should be.

searchDocs.title: ActiveCast
searchDocs.content: On this page ActiveCast Show Private An ActiveCast represents a bullet fired by a parent Caster. It contains methods of accessing the physics data of this specific bullet at any given time, as well as methods to alter its trajectory during runtime.

searchDocs.title: ObjectCache
searchDocs.content: ObjectCache This item is only intended to be used by the module's authors. Private ObjectCache usage should be derived from their DevForum post: https://devforum.roblox.com/t/objectcache-a-modern-blazing-fast-model-and-part-cache/3104112

searchDocs.title: Changelog‚Äã
searchDocs.content: Refactored ActiveCast.luauMerged ActiveBlockcast.luau and ActiveSpherecast.luau with ActiveCast.luauUpdated TypeDef, Enums, FastCastVMs

searchDocs.title: Fixed‚Äã
searchDocs.content: Spherecast not workingType errorsTypo fixesNo longer errors now when attempting to index with FastCastEvents with guarding

searchDocs.title: Added‚Äã
searchDocs.content: Spherecast feature ‚Äî adds sphere-based casting for broader collision detection and hits testing.

searchDocs.title: Changed‚Äã
searchDocs.content: Blockcast visualization no longer stretched by cast length.Cleaned up code and performed minor refactors for readability.Updated documentation comments for clarity.

searchDocs.title: Added‚Äã
searchDocs.content: Support for initial UserData on cast behaviors (behavior.UserData).Additional Caster interface methods to mirror ActiveCast/ActiveBlockcast functionality.

searchDocs.title: Changed‚Äã
searchDocs.content: Refactored core architecture into an Entity-Component-System (ECS) structure.Updated FastCast method calls to use object-style syntax (FastCast:method()).Renamed events for clarity: RayHit ‚Üí HitCanRayPierce ‚Üí CanPierceRayPierced ‚Üí Pierced Improved and corrected type definitions.Updated documentation comments for clarity and accuracy.

searchDocs.title: Removed‚Äã
searchDocs.content: Removed BetterLengthChangedModule.Removed CanRayPierceModule (functionality replaced by FastCastEventsModule).

searchDocs.title: Fixed‚Äã
searchDocs.content: Fixed crash in Caster:Destroy() when indexing nil components.Fixed module loading issues when required in parallel threads.Added safeguards to prevent indexing nil FastCastEventsModule.Added proper initialization checks to prevent premature Caster method usage.

searchDocs.title: Changed‚Äã
searchDocs.content: Internal structural improvements and refactoring for stability.Documentation refinements and cleanup.

searchDocs.title: Fixed‚Äã
searchDocs.content: Various minor internal consistency fixes.

searchDocs.title: Added‚Äã
searchDocs.content: Introduced FastCast2 testing ground.Added benchmarking tools.Added AWPTestGround for projectile behavior testing.

searchDocs.title: Added‚Äã
searchDocs.content: Introduced testing framework components.Added client-server projectile simulation.Added performance testing scenarios.Added unreliable packet networking support.

searchDocs.title: Added‚Äã
searchDocs.content: Initial release of FastCast2.Core casting and blockcasting functionality.Basic project structure.Initial Roblox Studio test project.

searchDocs.title: Introduction
searchDocs.content: Introduction FastCast2 It's a Roblox projectile library powered by VMsDispatcher designed to simulate thousands of projectiles without relying on physics replication. Because FastCast is no longer actively maintained by EtiTheSpirit, this repository continues the project with updates and adaptations. Benefits of using FastCast2 Highly customizableVersatile projectile libraryParallel scripting supportEasy to use and integrateRaycast and Blockcast, Spherecast supportBulkMoveTo supportBuilt-in ObjectCacheFlexible and extensible designImproves development productivityHigh PerformanceCompletely free

searchDocs.title: new‚Äã
searchDocs.content: </> FastCast.new() ‚Üí¬ÝCaster  WARNING You must initialize the Caster before using it. Failing to do so will result in nothing happening when attempting to fire! Contructs a new Caster object.

searchDocs.title: Init‚Äã
searchDocs.content: </> FastCast:Init( numWorkers:¬Ýnumber,-- The number of worker VMs to create for this Caster. Must be greater than 1. newParent:¬ÝFolder ,-- The Folder in which to place the FastCastVMs Folder newName:¬Ýstring,-- The name to give the FastCastVMs Folder containing worker scripts. ContainerParent:¬ÝFolder ,-- The parent Folder in which to place the worker VM Containers. VMContainerName:¬ÝFolder ,-- The name to give to the Containers housing each worker VM. VMname:¬Ýstring,-- The name to give each worker VM. useBulkMoveTo:¬Ýboolean,-- Whether to enable BulkMoveTo for the CosmeticBulletObjects FastCastEventsModule:¬ÝModuleScript ,-- The ModuleScript containing the FastCastEvents, A table of callback functions (events/hooks) used by ActiveCast.. useObjectCache:¬Ýboolean,-- Whether to use ObjectCache for the Caster Template:¬ÝBasePart |¬ÝModel ,-- The template object to use for the ObjectCache (if enabled) CacheSize:¬Ýnumber,-- The size of the ObjectCache (if enabled) CacheHolder:¬ÝInstance -- The Instance in which to place cached objects (if enabled) ) ‚Üí¬Ý() Initializes the Caster with the given parameters. This is required before firing using Raycasts in the Caster or nothing will happen!

searchDocs.content: </> type FastCastEvents = { CanPierce:¬ÝCanPierceFunction, Hit:¬ÝOnHitFunction, Pierced:¬ÝOnPiercedFunction, LengthChanged:¬ÝOnLengthChangedFunction, CastTerminating:¬ÝOnCastTerminatingFunction, CastFire:¬ÝOnCastFireFunction } A table of callback functions (events/hooks) used by ActiveCast. These functions are invoked by ActiveCast during a lifecycle (e.g., length updates, pierce checks).

searchDocs.content: </> type OnPierceFunction = ( vaildcast, RaycastResult, Vector3 , Instance? )¬Ý‚Üí¬Ý() Callback fired when the cast pierces something.
